events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: performing a wheel alignment without following it with OEM-required ADAS recalibration is a non-compliant shortcut, not acceptable practice — alignment changes the vehicle's geometric reference, so camera/radar-based safety systems (AEB, LKA, ACC) end up aimed against stale data. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective actions to hold the vehicle and complete static/dynamic recalibration and documentation before release.
